[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeGrid](../../TextmodeGrid.md) / width

# Accessor: width

## Get Signature

```ts
get width(): number;
```

Total grid width in screen pixels.

This is equal to `cols * cellWidth`.

### Returns

`number`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="width" encoded-code="-IHsKCXQucmVzaXplQ2FudmFzKHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lcldpZHRoLCB3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJIZWlnaHQpOwp9KTs" />
